extracted.title: Operational Advisory: Zero Non-firm Withdrawals – Hardy Storage
extracted.description:
Effective Gas Day Monday, December 1, 2025, and until further notice, Hardy Storage Company has zero non-firm capacity available for withdrawals.

Customers will not be allowed to exceed their Maximum Daily Withdrawal Quantity, or their Maximum Monthly Net Withdrawal Quantity as outlined in Part V, Section 1.4 of the Hardy tariff.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.
